commands_run:
printf 'using-superpowers
'; sed -n '1,220p' /Users/ares/.codex/superpowers/skills/using-superpowers/SKILL.md; printf '
---
using-git-worktrees
'; sed -n '1,260p' /Users/ares/.codex/superpowers/skills/using-git-worktrees/SKILL.md; printf '
---
CLAUDE
'; sed -n '1,220p' CLAUDE.md

echo "I'm using the using-git-worktrees skill to set up an isolated workspace." >&2
set -e
pwd
printf '\n[check existing branch/worktree]\n'
git branch --list 'codex/round-1-consolidate-bound-child-helpers'
git worktree list --porcelain
printf '\n[check target path]\n'
if [ -e /Users/ares/.config/superpowers/worktrees/mlf4/round-1-consolidate-bound-child-helpers ]; then
  ls -ld /Users/ares/.config/superpowers/worktrees/mlf4/round-1-consolidate-bound-child-helpers
else
  echo 'missing'
fi

set -e
mkdir -p /Users/ares/.config/superpowers/worktrees/mlf4
git worktree add /Users/ares/.config/superpowers/worktrees/mlf4/round-1-consolidate-bound-child-helpers -b codex/round-1-consolidate-bound-child-helpers master
cd /Users/ares/.config/superpowers/worktrees/mlf4/round-1-consolidate-bound-child-helpers
printf 'PWD=%s\n' "$PWD"
git status --short --branch
